settings.heading: How does it fit?
settings.content: Our covers are made with a stretch fabric and elasticated edges, so they hug the shape of your sofa. Pull the cover over the seat and back, then tuck the excess into the gaps for a snug, tailored look. Most people have it on in a few minutes, no tools needed.

settings.heading: What is included?
settings.content: Your order includes the sofa cover in your chosen colour and size, plus foam anti-slip sticks to keep it tucked in place. Care guidance is included so you know exactly how to wash and refit it.

settings.heading: Materials & care
settings.content: Made from a soft, durable stretch fabric that protects against pets, scratches, spills and daily wear. Machine washable at a low temperature and quick to dry. Check the size guide and measure your sofa before ordering for the best fit.

settings.alt: Sofa cover in a finished room

settings.heading: Made for the sofas you actually live on
settings.text: See the fabric, colour and fit from every angle before choosing the right cover for your sofa.

Sofa refreshed with a Meave cover
settings.heading: A fresh look, without the price of new
settings.text: A well-made cover gives a tired sofa a second life, protects it from pets, kids and daily wear, and lets you change the look of a room in minutes.

settings.image_alt: Meave Sinclair, founder of Meave London
settings.heading: Designed in London, for real homes
settings.text:
Meave London started with something its founder, Meave Sinclair, couldn't stop thinking about. As an interior stylist in London, she spent her days making rooms feel calm and finished, only to see them let down by tired, worn furniture that cost a fortune to replace.

So she set out to make simple, well-made pieces that give a real home a fresh, finished feel without the price tag or the hassle. Everything is chosen to be easy to live with, easy to care for, and built to handle everyday life with pets and kids.

settings.heading: A cover that actually fits and lasts
settings.text: Everything you need to protect and refresh your sofa is clear before checkout: fit, fabric, colour and care.

settings.question: How do I choose the right size?
settings.answer: Measure the width of your sofa from armrest to armrest and check it against the size guide on this page. If you are between sizes, size up for a more relaxed fit.

settings.question: Is it easy to put on?
settings.answer: Yes. Pull the stretch cover over the seat and back, then tuck the excess into the gaps and secure it with the included foam sticks. Most people have it on in a few minutes.

settings.question: Will it protect my sofa from pets and spills?
settings.answer: It does. The durable fabric guards against pet hair, scratches, spills and daily wear, and lifts straight off for a wash whenever you need.

settings.question: Can I machine wash it?
settings.answer: Yes. Machine wash on a cool, gentle cycle and let it air dry or tumble on low. It goes straight back on and keeps its shape wash after wash.

settings.question: Will it slip or move around?
settings.answer: The elasticated edges and included anti-slip foam sticks keep the cover tucked in and in place, even with everyday use.

settings.heading: Sofa cover questions
settings.text: Everything you need to choose, fit and care for your cover with confidence.

settings.heading: Complete the look
settings.description: Pair this cover with matching cushion covers and other Meave home accents.
